title: Get a vehicle registration summary
description: Get a one-page summary of a vehicle’s registration status for a sale or import.
summary: The Vehicle Registration Summary Sheet is a one-page document the Barbados Licensing Authority uses to capture the key facts about a newly-imported, newly-registered or re-registered vehicle.

It is normally completed alongside the main registration form. The Licensing Authority uses the summary sheet to confirm the registration type – for example, ‘new import with new registration number’ or ‘transfer’ – and to record the chassis and engine numbers in one place.
Citizens rarely fill this in on their own. Most people will see it as part of the bundle of paperwork their dealership or shipping agent submits on their behalf.
If you are managing the import yourself, complete it together with the LA.33 registration form and the Application for the Importation of Vehicles into Barbados form.

items: the registration type (new import with new number, new or used import with existing number, transfer or other change)
your full name, address and contact details
the make, model, year, chassis number and engine number

fees: There is no separate fee, but you may need to pay related registration or import fees.

options.heading: In person
content: Take the completed Vehicle Registration Summary Sheet to the Barbados Licensing Authority along with your other registration documents.

contact.address:
The Pine, East–West Boulevard
St. Michael
BB11000

assumptions: Because the summary sheet is normally completed alongside other registration forms, fees and processing times are tied to those forms rather than to this one. The entry page reflects that.
‘Citizens rarely fill this in on their own’ is a working assumption – it could be that more individuals than I expect do submit it directly.
